articles.title: US, Iran reach peace deal; signing set for Friday, says Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif
articles.description: US-Iran peace deal: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif said Washington and Tehran have agreed to end the conflict, with a signing ceremony planned in Switzerland as talks continue on Iran's nuclear programme.

articles.title: Watch: Hegseth challenged mid-interview after claim US controlled Hormuz 'this entire time'
articles.description: US official Pete Hegseth faced questions after claiming Washington controlled the Strait of Hormuz, as CBS interviewer challenged the need for negotiations amid ongoing US-Iran tensions over the strategic waterway.

articles.title: Donald Trump says war-ending deal with Iran reached
articles.description: President Trump and the prime minister of Pakistan said Sunday that the U.S. and Iran had reached an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end more than three months of war. “I hereby fully authorize the toll-free opening of the Strait of Hormuz, and, simultaneously herewith, authorize the immediate ...

articles.title: PM Modi in Slovakia for historic visit, aims to deepen relations
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi arrived in Bratislava, Slovakia, for a historic first-ever state visit. He will hold talks with President Peter Pellegrini and PM Robert Fico to enhance cooperation in trade, investment, and other strategic sectors.

articles.title: Ludhiana: Girl escapes captors, 8 booked for trafficking, child marriage
articles.description: The victim reunited with her mother in Haryana after 14 years and approached police after constant intimidation from the accused

articles.title: US-Iran Strike Peace Deal After Months of War, Formal Signing Set for Switzerland
articles.description: Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced a peace agreement between the United States and Iran, aimed at resolving ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.

articles.title: Ludhiana’s Atam Nagar MLA Kulwant Singh Sidhu targeted on stray dog feeding limits.
articles.description: Ludhiana’s Atam Nagar MLA Kulwant Singh Sidhu targeted on stray dog feeding limits.

articles.title: Buzz of early poll in Punjab, parties start preparations
articles.description: The AICC’s decision to constitute a committee under Ajay Maken late Thursday night for a report on the Punjab Congress unit is said to be dictated by urgency for quick changes in the state organisation as needed. AAP is preparing for a scenario of Nov polls, and BJP is also active on Punjab front. Further, there is speculation in Congress whether Uttarakhand polls will also be brought forward.

articles.title: UP Polls 2027: Owaisi kicks off campaign, sets terms for alliance
articles.description: Asaduddin Owaisi announced AIMIM's first candidate for the 2027 UP polls, Shaukat Ali from Matera. He said the party is open to an alliance to defeat the BJP but demanded 'respect, equality' and a fair share in power, not a subordinate role.

articles.title: Bengaluru residents in Pai Layout protest civic neglect, demand immediate action
articles.description: Pai Layout residents hit the streets over civic neglect

articles.title: 20 rebel TMC MPs to merge with Nationalist Citizens Party, back NDA: Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar
articles.description: India News: NEW DELHI: Twenty rebel Trinamool Congress (TMC) MPs in Lok Sabha are set to merge with the Nationalist Citizens Party and would extend their support .

articles.title: Dalit Christians to participate in ‘Chalo Eluru’ on June 28
articles.description: Dalit Christians urged to join 'Chalo Eluru' on June 28 to advocate for their rights and protections.

articles.title: Rebel TMC MP Kakoli’s son to return gifts from Mamata Banerjee, send legal notice over remarks
articles.description: Son of rebel Trinamool Congress MP Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar on Sunday said he would return gifts presented by former West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee to him and his wife, citing "recent events" and "personal conscience".

articles.title: TMC rebellion: MPs meet Speaker, demand separate seating arrangement
articles.description: Rebel TMC MPs, including Kakoli Ghosh Dastidar and Sudip Bandyopadhyay, met Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla demanding separate seating. The MPs also met Union Minister Bhupender Yadav, with their camp claiming support of up to 22 MPs for the NDA.

articles.title: Halt force in PoK or risk Pakistan's existence: Altaf Hussain
articles.description: MQM founder Altaf Hussain warned Pakistan to halt military action in PoK, stating continued force against residents could threaten Pakistan's own stability. He condemned the crackdown and expressed solidarity with protestors demanding their rights.

articles.title: G.K. Vasan: TMC to strengthen organisational structure for elections
articles.description: TMC President G. K. Vasan stated the party's focus is on strengthening its organisation for local body elections. He clarified that TMC is currently not part of the NDA alliance, though it maintains friendly relations with both the BJP and AIADMK.

articles.title: US Iran war: Israeli military on alert, preparing for 'potential' incoming fire after Beirut strike
articles.description: US-Iran war news: Israel's military is on high alert. They anticipate a retaliatory strike within hours. This comes after an Israeli strike on Beirut's southern suburbs earlier Sunday. The military is preparing for potential fire towards Israeli territory. The exact origin of the expected attack remains unspecified.

articles.title: PM Modi ensuring no supply disruption amid global risks: Sitharaman
articles.description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman said despite global risks from crude prices and West Asia tensions, the Modi govt has ensured no supply disruptions. She highlighted India's status as the fastest-growing economy and key welfare schemes.

articles.title: Iran Fires Warning Shot At Trump After Beirut Bombing; Issues Big Order To IRGC; 'STOP NETANYAHU...'
articles.description: The delicate, backchannel peace negotiations between Washington and Tehran are hanging by a thread, following an ultimatum issued by the Iranian Parliament’s National Security Commission. Tehran has explicitly conditioned the survival of the Pakistan-mediated diplomatic track on the United States’ ability to restrain its regional partner, Israel. Following an unprovoked Israel Defense Forces airstrike on a residential neighborhood in southern Beirut, Iranian official Ebrahim Rezaei warned that any broader regional security understanding is "mathematically impossible" while Tel Aviv violates the active, US-managed ceasefire framework. Shifting the strategic burden entirely onto Washington, Tehran declared that if President Trump expects an implementable accord, he must discipline his ally—warning that Iran's missile divisions are fully mobilized and postured to deliver a painful defensive response should these unilateral incursions continue.

articles.title: INS Sharda strengthens India-Sri Lanka maritime ties with port call
articles.description: INS Sharda departed Colombo after a port call that strengthened maritime ties between India and Sri Lanka through training and exchanges. The ship also deployed to the Maldives for a Humanitarian Assistance and Disaster Relief (HADR) exercise.

articles.title: ‘Mythos’ and ‘Fable’ deliver a reality check: India needs AI sovereignty and supply-chain resilience
articles.description: A National AI Mission is required, designed at scale, capable of integrating public and private efforts, and focused on building foundational technologies rather than incremental improvements

articles.title: Who Is Sumit Roy? The Powerful Abhishek Banerjee Aide Now Under The Police Radar
articles.description: Sumit Roy has been known in political circles as Abhishek Banerjee's close confidant and trusted aide. Party insiders often describe him as Abhishek's "shadow".

articles.title: Did smartphones help drive America’s baby bust? A new study thinks so
articles.description: Researchers say early iPhone access may have played a role in the sharp fall in US births after 2007, especially among teens and young adults. Other experts say the story is far more complicated.

articles.title: Amid ₹370 biryani row, Kunal Kamra takes a dig at Pranit More's apology: ‘Comedians should stop hiding behind crowdwork’
articles.description: The controversy erupted after Himanshu Jangra made insensitive comments about women at Pranit More's show. Pranit apologised for the hurt caused.

articles.title: '31 seats were alms from PMK: AIADMK leader Shanmugam attacks Palaniswami
articles.description: '31 seats were alms from PMK: AIADMK leader Shanmugam attacks Palaniswami

articles.title: From the Opinions Editor: Beyond mental health: SC report’s urgent message on student suicides
articles.description: Deaths on campuses show Indian universities have much to do to create an environment in which diversity is valued and vulnerability is met with support

articles.title: HR&CE Department invites applications for appointment of non-hereditary trustees in 214 Tamil Nadu temples
articles.description: HR&CE Department invites applications for non-hereditary trustee positions in 214 Tamil Nadu temples, ensuring transparency in selection.

articles.title: Romania gets new PM nominee after previous candidate withdraws
articles.description: Romania gets new PM nominee after previous candidate withdraws

articles.title: 'Problem Is Propaganda': Ali Fazal's 'Raakh' Faces Backlash Over Changes To Real-Life Ranga-Billa Case
articles.description: 'Problem Is Propaganda': Ali Fazal's 'Raakh' Faces Backlash Over Changes To Real-Life Ranga-Billa Case

articles.title: Civilian seafarers must not become casualties of geopolitics
articles.description: Naval operations must prioritise the absolute protection of civilian life. Any US strike that inflicts harm on neutral Indian sailors represents a severe breach of international norms that demands transparent accountability, formal apologies, and immediate systemic changes to rules of engagement

articles.title: Military build-up along Nato's norther border: Russia expands bases near Finland, Norway
articles.description: Russia is significantly bolstering its military infrastructure along NATO's northern flank, with new bases and troop accommodations appearing near Finland and Norway. This expansion, revealed by satellite imagery, includes major projects in Karelia and the Murmansk region. Security officials express serious concern, noting a substantial troop increase.

articles.title: Rebel TMC MP Kakoli Ghosh's son sends legal notice to Mamata, others over Barasat ticket claims
articles.description: The notice issued an ultimatum for those it was addressed to, asking them to retract “all false, defamatory, and misleading statements” regarding Baidyanath.

articles.title: 'We can help if police can’t identify guilty': Akhilesh Yadav on SIT probe into Ram temple trust funds
articles.description: Samajwadi Party chief Akhilesh Yadav questioned the Yogi Adityanath government's probe into Ram temple donation irregularities, hinting at a conspiracy close to home. The Uttar Pradesh government formed a three-member SIT to investigate allegations of financial mismanagement. This follows claims of missing funds and calls for transparency from various quarters, though the temple trust maintains internal audits are ongoing.

articles.title: Owaisi urges ECI for inclusive voter list revision in Telangana
articles.description: AIMIM Chief Asaduddin Owaisi urged the Election Commission to ensure the Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls in Telangana is inclusive and does not cause difficulties for the poor, stressing that the right to vote is their greatest power.

articles.title: "New world order" could be woven at G7 Summit: Canadian PM Carney
articles.description: Canadian PM Mark Carney says the G7 Summit could weave a 'new world order' by including nations like India and Brazil. He stressed the need for global AI regulation, warning of vulnerabilities, a topic he expects to be discussed in France.

articles.title: ECI should include names of all genuine voters of Telangana during SIR: Owaisi
articles.description: ECI should include names of all genuine voters of Telangana during SIR: Owaisi

articles.title: 'Are Indian Mariners Fair Game for US Missiles?': Tharoor's Scathing Attack on Washington After Rubio's Statement
articles.description: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor criticised the United States for the deaths of three Indian mariners in a military strike on the MT Settebello in the Gulf of Oman.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Agatha Christie: ‘An archaeologist is the best husband a woman can have. The older she gets, the more...’
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Agatha Christie suggests that an archaeologist makes the best husband because he becomes more interested as his wife ages, offering a timeless perspective on love and aging. This insight challenges modern culture's focus on novelty, highlighting how enduring relationships deepen with shared history and appreciation for a partner's evolving character.

articles.title: Former West Bengal minister Manas Ranjan Bhunia quits TMC amid party rift
articles.description: Speaking to the media, he confirmed that he had submitted his resignation letter to Mamata Banerjee, requesting her to accept his resignation from the primary membership of the party

articles.title: India’s GCC ecosystem needs stronger policy support
articles.description: This article is authored by Hardeep Chadha, senior VP, accounting, and audit consulting, SC&H India.

articles.title: Modi, Trump set for first meeting since February amid trade, Iran war concerns
articles.description: While the bilateral meeting on the margins of the G7 Summit was announced by White House officials, there was no official word from the Indian side.

articles.title: Shivamogga steps up fight for Karnataka High Court circuit bench
articles.description: Shivamogga steps up fight for High Court Circuit Bench

articles.title: BJP Karnataka alleges irregularities in 'Gruha Lakshmi' scheme, criticises govt
articles.description: BJP alleges irregularities in ‘Gruha Lakshmi’ scheme and criticises government

articles.title: PM Modi Lands In France; G7, Bharat Innovates Summit, Bilateral Talks With Macron On Agenda
articles.description: PM Modi Lands In France; G7, Bharat Innovates Summit, Bilateral Talks With Macron On Agenda

articles.title: Morning Digest: PM’s Europe Visit Begins in Nice, with tech and bilateral ties in focus; Trump says Iran deal to be signed on Sunday, and more
Another Trinamool MP meets Union minister, speculations rise over switch amid TMC crisis
articles.description: Bandyopadhyay’s move triggered sharp reactions from TMC leaders in Kolkata still owing allegiance to party chairperson Mamata Banerjee.

articles.title: Supreme Court wants cases of SIR excluded to be decided before next polls. A reality check from Assam
articles.description: In 1997, around 3 lakh voters in Assam were marked ‘Doubtful’ during an intensive revision of rolls. Ahead of this year’s Assembly polls, the state had 93,000 ‘D’ voters still, with cases dragging on in tribunals, courts

articles.title: PM Modi lands in France on first leg of two-nation visit, receives grand welcome in Nice
articles.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Saturday landed in France's Nice, where he is set to hold talks with French President Emmanuel Macron. This is the first leg of his two-nation visit, with Slovakia being the second country he will be visiting as part of the week-long tour. He will return to France next week after visiting Slovakia to attend the upcoming G7 Summit there.In Nice, PM Modi was received by a delegation of senior French dignitaries, including Minister of Education Edouard Geffray, Minister of Higher Education, Research and Space Philippe Baptiste and France's Ambassador to India, Thierry Mathou.

articles.title: PM Modi, Macron to jointly inaugurate Bharat Innovates 2026 in Nice
articles.description: PM Narendra Modi and French President Emmanuel Macron will inaugurate Bharat Innovates 2026 in France. This national initiative aims to identify, mentor, and showcase India's top tech ventures, connecting them with a global network of investors.

articles.title: Trump signals US-Iran deal due Sunday; Tehran says signing not expected yet
articles.description: Donald Trump says a US-Iran peace deal will be signed Sunday and the Strait of Hormuz will reopen immediately. Iran says the agreement is unlikely to be signed on Sunday and may take several more days.
